description_long: This is a modern, minimalist two-seater sofa with a clean, rectangular silhouette and straight lines. The upholstery is a solid, light beige color with a smooth, matte finish, giving it a contemporary and understated appearance. The sofa features two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all of which appear to be attached and seamlessly integrated into the frame. The armrests are straight, flat, and of equal height to the backrest, creating a boxy profile. The sofa stands on four slender, black legs positioned at each corner, slightly elevating the frame above the ground. There are no visible decorative elements, tufting, or patterns, emphasizing a sleek and functional design suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, light beige two-seater sofa with straight armrests, attached cushions, and four slim black legs. The design is minimalist and boxy, with a smooth, matte fabric finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sofa's two large seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and overall boxy shape.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the straight, flat armrest and the slim black legs beneath the sofa.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous, unadorned backrest and the sofa's clean, rectangular profile.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the straight armrest and slim leg design.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all attached and seamlessly integrated into the frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, flat armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slim, straight black legs positioned at each corner, slightly elevating the sofa; legs are exposed and have a minimalist style.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest of medium height, matching the armrest height, with no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth, matte fabric with no visible pattern, texture, or decorative stitching.
